mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SURVEY(num, code, sdate, sub) VALUES (survey_seq.NEXTVAL, #{code}, SYSDATE, #{sub})

INSERT ALL
INTO SURVEYCONTENT(SUBCODE, surveycnt, surveytitle, surveytype) VALUES (survey_seq.CURRVAL, #{item.surveycnt}, #{item.surveytitle}, #{item.surveytype})
select * from dual
mapper.update: UPDATE SURVEYCONTENT SET surveycnt = SURVEYcnt + 1 WHERE subcode=#{subcode} AND surveytype=#{surveytype}
